name: self-hosted-ai-stack
desc: Deploy a complete self-hosted AI stack with Docker Compose: Ollama, LiteLLM, AnythingLLM, Whisper, WhisperLive, Kokoro, Embeddings, Docling and MCP Gateway. Lo…
descFull: Deploy a complete self-hosted AI stack with Docker Compose: Ollama, LiteLLM, AnythingLLM, Whisper, WhisperLive, Kokoro, Embeddings, Docling and MCP Gateway. Local-first, private by default, with lightweight stacks, optional HTTPS and NVIDIA CUDA acceleration. Multi-arch: amd64, arm64.
